hook: Opening day. A new World Cup begins.
facts: Mexico has hosted the World Cup more times than any other nation.
South Africa was the first African country to host a World Cup.
These two met on opening day in 2010 — Tshabalala scored a screamer.
question: Who takes the opener?
caption: it's actually here. opening day vibes 🔥 who you got? #WorldCup2026 #football #matchday
